payloads.text: ⚠️ Cron job "Daily AI Trends on Twitter" failed: FailoverError: ⚠️ openrouter (openrouter/auto) returned a billing error — your API key has run out of credits or has an insufficient balance. Check your openrouter billing dashboard and top up or switch to a different API key.

lastError: Telegram send failed: chat not found (chat_id=1003916184688). Likely: bot not started in DM, bot removed from group/channel, group migrated (new -100… id), or wrong bot token. Input was: "1003916184688".
